metadata.name: Multiple replacement effects — player chooses order (CR 616.1)
metadata.description: p1 controls a commander and Rest in Peace is active. The commander would die (via SBA). Two replacements apply: the commander zone-change replacement (die -> command zone) and Rest in Peace (die -> exile). The affected player (p1, the commander's owner) must order them via Command::OrderReplacements. Choosing the command-zone replacement first sends the commander to command zone; choosing RiP first sends it to exile and then the commander replacement optionally applies again from exile.
metadata.generation_notes: Pending harness support for Command::OrderReplacements. The harness currently skips unknown player actions. When harness support is added, this script tests CR 616.1 player choice between two competing replacements. See corner case #18.

disputes.description: The 'order_replacements' player action is not yet supported by the replay harness. This script is pending_review until Command::OrderReplacements handling is added to translate_player_action.

script.step_note: p1 casts Rest in Peace, then their commander would die — two replacements compete

actions.note: p1 casts Rest in Peace. Both commander zone-change replacement and RiP will compete.
Rest in Peace resolves, enters battlefield, registers its replacement effect.
Rest in Peace enters battlefield, registering global graveyard->exile replacement.

results.description: Commander (Llanowar Elves) would die. Two replacements apply: commander zone-change (->command zone) and RiP (->exile). p1 must choose order via OrderReplacements.

actions.note: CR 616.1: Multiple replacements apply; affected player chooses order. Engine emits ReplacementChoiceRequired.
p1 chooses commander zone-change replacement first -> commander goes to command zone. RiP no longer applies (modified destination is no longer graveyard).

actions.description: Commander in command zone after player ordered commander replacement first
actions.note: Commander went to command zone; not in graveyard (RiP didn't apply). Note: harness currently skips order_replacements action — this script is pending_review.
